ogTitle: Glen Niven vs Glen Ruth: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Glen Niven and Glen Ruth.
heading: Glen Niven vs Glen Ruth — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Glen Niven, Queensland and Glen Ruth, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Glen Ruth has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Glen Niven (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Glen Niven or Glen Ruth safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Glen Niven has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Glen Ruth scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Glen Niven scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Glen Ruth scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Glen Niven or Glen Ruth?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Glen Ruth has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.62% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
